module Acme.Billing (charge) where

import Network.HTTP.Simple (Request, addRequestHeader)
import Data.ByteString.Char8 (pack)

apiToken :: String
apiToken = "example_live_token_do_not_use_0123456789abcdef"

charge :: Request -> Request
charge = addRequestHeader "Authorization" (pack ("Bearer " <> apiToken))
